final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original styled food photography image of Korean cafe-style coffee and desserts, shot as if taken on a smartphone for Instagram, with no people, and hand-drawn white-pen annotation overlays added to each visible element.

Style/medium: needs a Korean cafe aesthetic shot in a casual smartphone-Instagram style, with hand-drawn white-pen annotation overlays — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: needs an Instagram Stories / magazine rough-notes layout feel — exact framing and angle are yours
Subject: must include Korean cafe-style coffee drink(s) and dessert(s) as focal subjects, no people; must include hand-drawn white annotation overlays on each visible element:
  - 飲み物 → 味・温度・気持ちのコメント（例：すっきり、やさしい甘さ）
  - 食べ物 → 食感・おいしさのコメント（例：しっとり、さいこう）
  - 空間 → 雰囲気のコメント（例：まったり、いい時間）
  - 全体 → ひとことまとめ（例：しあわせすぎた～）
Scene/backdrop: must include a Korean cafe interior or surface context
Lighting/mood: needs a soft, warm, casual cafe atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a muted, aesthetic Korean cafe direction — exact tones and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs hand-drawn annotation treatment — white pen, single-stroke rough slightly uneven lines, outline tracing around object edges, arrows and dashed lines for visual flow guidance; decorative accents (steam wisps, sparkles, small hearts, mini emoji-style doodles) added moderately with breathing room / negative space preserved
Text (verbatim): must include handwritten-style Japanese annotation text (7割ひらがな、3割かんたんな漢字) in short diary-like self-murmur tone for each annotated element; exact comment wording is yours — follow the tone of: 「やさしい甘さ」「しっとり」「まったり」「しあわせすぎた～」
Constraints: must preserve no-people rule; all annotation text must be Japanese handwritten style; annotation lines must appear as white-pen single-stroke rough outlines, not digital clean vectors; decorative elements must not overcrowd — preserve visual breathing room
Avoid: people or human figures; clean digital vector annotation lines; overcrowded decorations; English annotation text
